productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Classic Sneakers Off White Casual Shoes
description: Add a fresh twist to your off-duty essentials with this pair of united colors of benetton shoes. Keeping up with the international mood of the moment - the understated - these shoes add a definite touch of class to your casual ensembles. Crafted for the cosmopolitan male who believes in low-key sophistication when it comes to his wardrobe, style these with form fitting denims and a tonal tee, or corduroy trousers and a polo T-shirt. UpperTwo tone suede upper with contrast nubuck overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tongue and heel collarFabric innerMidsolePU midsoleOutsoleRubber outsole with patterned groovesshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
